subject: refactor(ui): fix remaining hygiene findings from clean pass
body:
- Extract useClickOutside hook from HamburgerMenu inline click-outside
  handler (new code introduced by hamburger menu commit)
- Remove redundant handleDone wrapper in QuickGuide (was just calling
  onClose with no extra logic)
- Remove redundant const mobile = isMobile aliasing in Timeline,
  Contributors, Progress, and Tags (use isMobile directly)
- Replace hasOwnProperty with in operator in Progress semver check
- Simplify redundant null-or-empty check in Contributors
